name: Roman Bean Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the soaked beans and place them in a large pot with the stock.
2. Add the chopped onion, carrot, celery, tomatoes, garlic, lemon juice, and grated rind from the lemon, as well as the bay leaf to the pot.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 1.5 hours. If needed, add more stock to keep the beans tender.
4. Remove the bay leaf before proceeding.
5. Using an immersion blender, puree half of the soup until smooth.
6. Return the puréed portion back into the pot with the remaining soup mixture.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Garnish with fresh parsley before serving hot.
